Interface ICreateMosaicDatasetParameters

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control mosaic dataset creation parameters.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("BE94FFC7-98F4-48D0-8FAD-C3F1834C768F")]
public interface ICreateMosaicDatasetParameters

Properties

BandCount

The number of bands in the mosaic dataset.

int BandCount { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefinitionFIDs

The definition selection set on the source catalog.

IFIDSet DefinitionFIDs { get; set; }

Property Value

IFIDSet

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefinitionGeometry

The definition (spatial selection) geometry on the source catalog.

IGeometry DefinitionGeometry { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

LODFieldName

The name of the field that contains scale values for items in the mosaic dataset.

string LODFieldName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

LODInfos

The levels of detail associated with the mosaic dataset.

IMosaicLODInfos LODInfos { get; set; }

Property Value

IMosaicLODInfos

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxCellsizeFieldName

The name of the field that contains maximum visible cell-size values for items in the mosaic dataset.

string MaxCellsizeFieldName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaximumVisibleCellsize

The cell-size value above which no mosaicking occurs.

double MaximumVisibleCellsize { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MinCellsizeFieldName

The name of the field that contains minimum visible cell-size values for items in the mosaic dataset.

string MinCellsizeFieldName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

PixelType

The pixel-type of the mosaic dataset.

rstPixelType PixelType { get; set; }

Property Value

rstPixelType
